title: Claude Code statusline config
description: Configuration for the vwf statusline script. The file next to the script holds the defaults; a <repo-root>/.config/statusline.json is deep-merged on top (objects merge key-by-key, arrays replace wholesale).

repo.description: Project display name shown in the `project` segment. When unset, a shortened cwd is shown instead.

name.description: Alias for `repo`; used only if `repo` is absent.

symbol.description: Glyph rendered before the project name. Defaults to `symbols.repo`.

palette.description: Named colours as 24-bit RGB triples. Referenced by name anywhere a colour is expected.

powerline.description: Powerline divider glyphs (require a Nerd Font).

sepThin.description: Thin divider used when two neighbours share a background.

cap.description: Rounded left cap that opens each line.

thinFg.description: Foreground colour of the thin divider.

defaultFg.description: Foreground colour for segments that don't set their own `fg`.

gauge.description: The fixed-width meter used by the `context` segment.

width.description: Number of blocks in the gauge.

worktreePattern.description: Case-insensitive regex matched against path components to detect a git worktree checkout; the subpath after the matched component feeds the `worktree` segment.

symbols.description: Glyph per data type. Keys consumed by the script: model, context, win5h, win7d, reset, session, cost, duration, repo, worktree, folder, branch, dirtyAdd, dirtyDel, dirtyMix, agent, tokens.

typeSymbols.description: Subagent `type` (lower-cased) -> glyph. `_default` is the fallback for unknown types.

segments.description: Default styling per main-bar segment id (model, context, rl5h, rl7d, session, cost, duration, project, worktree, branch). Overridden inline by an object entry in `lines`.

lines.description: Ordered list of rows; each row is an ordered list of segment entries. A row that resolves to no visible segments is dropped.

subagent.description: Configuration for the subagent panel surface.

descBudgetFraction.description: Fraction of the terminal width allotted to the description before it is truncated.

statuses.description: Status buckets, tried in order. The first whose `match` regex hits the task status wins; an entry with an empty `match` is the fallback for unmatched statuses.

match.description: Case-insensitive regex against the lower-cased task status. Empty string = fallback bucket.

segments.description: Styling for each subagent row segment.

head.description: Status/type/name head (background comes from the matched status; bg here is ignored).

color.description: A palette name, a hex string (#rgb or #rrggbb), or an RGB triple.

segmentEntry.description: Either a segment id string, or an object that names a segment and overrides its styling.
